items.title: 4,800 illegal infiltrators deported to Bangladesh, says Bengal CM Suvendu
items.summary: Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari said that holding centres have been set up in bordering districts of the State and 836 ‘illegal infiltrators’ who are being kept in the holding c...

items.title: Zelensky criticises 'vile' Chornobyl drone strike ahead of London talks
items.summary: Ukrainian officials say a Russian drone hit a storage facility for spent nuclear fuel near the Chornobyl nuclear plant.

items.title: Iranians Sink Into Despair Facing War Deaths and Skyrocketing Inflation
items.summary: An imploding economy is causing hopelessness among both pro- and anti-government Iranians. And for those who wished for regime change, the letdown is palpable.
